errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `SimulatedExecutor.submit` overrides parent class `FileBridgeExecutor` in an inconsistent manner
  `SimulatedExecutor.submit` has type `(self: SimulatedExecutor, command: TradeCommand, wait_for_result: bool = True, timeout_seconds: float | None = None) -> ExecutionResult`, which is not assignable to `(self: SimulatedExecutor, command: TradeCommand, wait_for_result: bool = True, timeout_seconds: float | None = None, _allow_symbol_retry: bool = True) -> ExecutionResult`, the type of `FileBridgeExecutor.submit`
  Signature mismatch:
  ...True, timeout_seconds: float | None = None, _allow_symbol_retry: bool = True) -> ExecutionResult: ...
                                               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ parameters
  ...True, timeout_seconds: float | None = None) -> ExecutionResult: ...
                                               ^ parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `SimulatedExecutor.submit` overrides parent class `FileBridgeExecutor` in an inconsistent manner

errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:

  `SimulatedExecutor.submit` has type `(self: SimulatedExecutor, command: TradeCommand, wait_for_result: bool = True, timeout_seconds: float | None = None) -> ExecutionResult`, which is not assignable to `(self: SimulatedExecutor, command: TradeCommand, wait_for_result: bool = True, timeout_seconds: float | None = None, _allow_symbol_retry: bool = True) -> ExecutionResult`, the type of `FileBridgeExecutor.submit`
  Signature mismatch:
  ...True, timeout_seconds: float | None = None, _allow_symbol_retry: bool = True) -> ExecutionResult: ...
                                               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ parameters
  ...True, timeout_seconds: float | None = None) -> ExecutionResult: ...
                                               ^ parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `SimulatedExecutor.submit` overrides parent class `FileBridgeExecutor` in an inconsistent manner
